claims.summary: Artifact cleanup must distinguish substantive semantic residue from whitespace left after structural tokens are stripped.
claims.disposition: implement non-whitespace remainder evidence and classify whitespace-only residue as erased output without changing cleanup behavior

claims.summary: An embedded or quoted artifact marker can occur inside a delicate reflection and should trigger semantic-integrity review rather than erase the surrounding thought silently.
claims.disposition: implement contextual-remainder evidence and focused embedded-marker regressions while preserving the surviving prose

claims.summary: The 512/513 and 1024/1025 profile boundaries are categorical cliffs that should be visible independently of felt depth.
claims.disposition: implement additive transition evidence naming profile floor, next boundary, distance, and both sides of each cliff without retuning token limits

claims.summary: A softened continuous live budget policy may feel more organic than categorical profile transitions.
claims.disposition: route an offline prompt-budget comparison before any live token-allocation or provider behavior change

claims.summary: Exact 512, 513, 1024, and 1025 requests should remain reproducibly classified.
claims.disposition: verify exact boundary tests and runtime diagnostic parity
